Part of a family-run repair business, '''R2-PU''' was an [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]] operating on the [[Galactic Rim/Legends|Galactic Rim]] for generations before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].
